description: Email with explicit usage rights clause
raw_text:
Dear Creator,

We're reaching out from NovaSport — an athletic wear brand. We'd like you to create 3 Instagram Reels featuring our new training collection.

Timeline: 3 weeks from signing.
Budget: KRW 1,800,000.
Payment: Net 15.

Usage rights: We require a perpetual, worldwide license to use the content across all our digital channels including website, social media, email, and YouTube ads. This includes the right to edit and adapt the content.

Please confirm if these terms work for you.

Regards,
Alex Choi
NovaSport Brand Team

expected_fields.usage_rights: perpetual worldwide license, all digital channels, right to edit
